summary: Verified two critical bug fixes for CarryOn estate planning: (1) Multi-role beneficiary users (testben@test.com with role=beneficiary + is_also_benefactor=true) now correctly redirect to /dashboard instead of /beneficiary on login. (2) Welcome to Your Estate intro step appears BEFORE Step 1 of 6 in guided overlay for multi-role users only.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js PublicRoute (Line 177-179): Correctly checks is_also_benefactor before redirecting beneficiaries - FIX VERIFIED
LoginPage.js navigateToHome (Line 135-136): Correctly checks is_also_benefactor for beneficiary role - FIX VERIFIED
DashboardPage.js (Line 106-108): Welcome step logic only triggers for role=beneficiary AND is_also_benefactor=true AND localStorage key not set - CORRECT
DashboardPage.js (Lines 365-389): Welcome step UI with 'Welcome to Your Estate' title and 'Let's Get Started' button - WORKING
ViewSwitcher.js (Line 16-17): isMultiRole correctly identifies multi-role users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: (1) testben@test.com (role=beneficiary + is_also_benefactor) correctly redirects to /dashboard. (2) Welcome step appears in guided overlay ONLY for users with role=beneficiary AND is_also_benefactor=true. fulltest@test.com (role=benefactor) does NOT see the guided overlay welcome step but does see OnboardingWizard tile - this is correct behavior.

verified_features.testben_redirects_to_dashboard: PASS - Multi-role beneficiary correctly redirected to /dashboard, NOT /beneficiary
verified_features.testben_sees_welcome_step: PASS - Welcome to Your Estate intro step appears before Step 1 of 6
verified_features.testben_welcome_step_has_button: PASS - Let's Get Started button visible and functional
verified_features.testben_transitions_to_step_1: PASS - After clicking Let's Get Started, shows Step 1 of 6
verified_features.testben_viewswitcher_visible: PASS - ViewSwitcher shows My Estate and Test Estate options
verified_features.testben_beneficiaries_page: PASS - Shows Sarah Mitchell (Spouse) and Jake Mitchell (Son)
verified_features.fulltest_redirects_to_dashboard: PASS - Pure benefactor correctly redirected to /dashboard
verified_features.fulltest_no_guided_welcome_step: PASS - Pure benefactor (role=benefactor) does NOT see guided overlay welcome step

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS OTP: MOCKED - OTP globally disabled via platform_settings.otp_disabled=true

screenshots: .screenshots/02_welcome_step.png - Welcome to Your Estate intro step for multi-role user
.screenshots/03_after_welcome_step.png - Step 1 of 6 after clicking Let's Get Started (shows Leave a Message for Sarah and/or Jake)
.screenshots/04_view_switcher.png - ViewSwitcher dropdown showing My Estate and Test Estate
.screenshots/05_beneficiaries.png - Beneficiaries page with Sarah Mitchell and Jake Mitchell
